notes: These are BridgeLink operational presets, not authoritative Star Citizen ship schematics.
You can edit and create new ships inside BridgeLink and save them in the cloud. This document is meant to be the stock ships found in Star Citizen along with their positions/seats
Slot labels are optimized for voice-command structure and can be adjusted as ship gameplay changes.
All generated role slots should start empty in Briefing Room. Users are assigned manually, by drag/drop, role request, or auto-assign.
Note that the presets for ships might be wrong. I encourage you to report mistakes on GitHub: https://github.com/Holseter-Development/BridgeLink-ShipPresets
